ksa_text: Ability to assess, evaluate, and monitor compliance with organizational and regulatory privacy requirements across systems, services, and business agreements.

dcwf.top_element_label: Facilitate cross-sharing of best practices for data usage.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Facilitate cross-sharing of best practices for data usage.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-A-004 (Security and Privacy/Ability) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.427, highest: DDaT at 0.427). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Domain-level data product ownership: data mesh principles, data contracts, domain model governance, inter-domain data agreements, and data product SLA management within a business domain.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.427, and Security and Privacy (SP) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Security and Privacy KSA (composite 0.427)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Domain Data Product Owner job postings does not surface this Security and Privacy competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
